# PasJSON

This repository may either commit `PasJSON.pas` directly or provide it from this
external dependency folder.

- Upstream: https://github.com/BeRo1985/pasjson
- License: zlib
- Used by: `PasGLTF.pas` and glTF loading support
- Local path expected if not committed directly: `External/PasJSON/`

If `PasJSON.pas` is committed directly, keep its zlib license header intact. If
you vendor the upstream package here, keep the upstream license file and
copyright notices.
